lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: 'Ello, and what are you after then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another assignment.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill [amount] [task monster].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, great!

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster]; you have [amount] to go. Come back when you've finished your task.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster], with [amount] to go.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please cancel it.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks, I want to try doing it.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any rewards for me, or anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I can handle any task.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: That's the spirit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In future, please don't give anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I don't want anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop checking my combat level - I can take anything!

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your skillcape, please.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: This is a Slayer's Skillcape. Only a true Slayer master is permitted to wear one and in recognition of such an achievement, Slayer masters may be persuaded to allow you to select the same assignment in a row.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: You need more training before you earn that honour, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Slayer's Skillcape, please?

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Well you have performed well as a student. I guess you have earned the right to wear such a prestigious cape now. The Slayer masters will recognize this cape and may offer you the same assignment twice in a row.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: That will be 99000 coins, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've changed my mind; I don't want it.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Okay. Well, if you change it back again, I will be waiting.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Good hunting, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're filling in for Duradel?

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: I am. The task he has been given is an important one, but this post must always be filled. Who better to fill it than his own daughter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Daughter? So being a Slayer Master runs in the family?

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Of course. One cannot simply grow up with someone like my father. My childhood consisted of a lot of training. My father has always been among the best, but he wanted me to be even better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like a lot of hard work.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Yes, but we wouldn't have it any other way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About Duradel...

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Are you here with news on Lucien?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: The moment you find him, you must come to me. I will ensure my father is avenged!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He wouldn't want you to get yourself killed as well!

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: I will not suffer the same fate as my father. I intend to be prepared. For a start, I have been researching my father's notes to find weaknesses in Lucien's demonic thralls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Those sound interesting. May I see them?

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Of course. If we expect to defeat Lucien, we must work together.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: I will not suffer the same fate as my father. That fate is reserved for Lucien!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you're right...

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: I will not suffer the same fate as my father. I intend to be prepared. For a start, I have been researching my father's notes to find weaknesses in Lucien's demonic thralls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Speaking of those notes, I seem to have misplaced them. Do you happen to have another copy?

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Luckily for you, I made many.

lines.speaker: Kuradal
lines.text: Return to me when you have space to carry them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Nothing...
